generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a retired NATO intelligence analyst, I've seen firsthand how our allies are falling behind on defense spending. While some argue we should reduce our commitment, the reality is that our alliances are the bedrock of global stability. When countries like Germany and Italy consistently underfund their defense, it puts more pressure on us to maintain deterrence. We can't afford to weaken these partnerships - it's not just about money, it's about maintaining the security framework that's protected us for decades. #NationalSecurity #AllianceCommitment
